response.justification: Bogdan is a strong, versatile senior engineer with ~18 years of production experience, deep TypeScript/Node expertise, AWS exposure, and notably relevant recent work on MCP servers and agentic-workflow tooling at re:cinq. However, the role requires 8+ years building AI-driven solutions, and his hands-on GenAI experience spans roughly one year; there is no evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, evaluation pipelines, Python, or leading customer-facing technical discovery at enterprise scale. He could grow into the role, but he does not currently meet the core AI-experience bar for a Staff FDE position.
strengths: Current hands-on experience with MCP code generators and agentic-workflow frameworks, directly matching key technologies
18+ years of full-stack production engineering with strong TypeScript, Node.js, AWS CDK, and Kubernetes exposure
Proven mentorship and communication skills through workshops, conference talks, and courses — useful for a customer-facing role
concerns: Falls well short of the required 8+ years building AI-driven solutions (~1 year of GenAI work)
No demonstrated experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM evaluation, or observability pipelines
Python is absent from his skill set, and there is no evidence of leading enterprise stakeholder discovery sessions

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering depth and cloud experience
